questions.q: In May 2026, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy announced that preparations have begun for a deal with Canada to co-produce what?

On May 13, 2026, it was revealed that a massive $1 billion AI data center project in Kenya had stalled because powering it would require switching off 'half the country'. Which tech giant was building it?
According to recent reports, the CIA has escalated its secret war with deadly operations against drug cartels inside which country?
Which federal Liberal MP announced in May 2026 that he will resign his seat before the summer recess following a provincial nomination loss in Scarborough Southwest?
Which major crowdfunding platform faced severe backlash on May 13, 2026, after announcing a total ban on all NSFW content from its website?
According to data released in May 2026, Canadian consumer insolvencies in the first quarter reached their highest level since which year?
As reported on May 13, 2026, twin IT workers wiped 96 government databases minutes after being fired. Which SQL command did one brother use to destroy a Department of Homeland Security database?
A lawsuit reported on May 13, 2026, alleges that an Oregon teenager tragically died of sepsis due to what medical error before receiving stitches?
options: Doctors failed to clean the wound
A nurse administered the wrong blood type
An anesthesiologist gave a lethal dose
A surgeon left a sponge in his abdomen
questions.correctText: Doctors failed to clean the wound

questions.q: Which e-commerce company's board formally rejected a $56 billion takeover offer from GameStop, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'?
A May 2026 report by Ontario's Auditor General found that artificial intelligence systems used by doctors were doing what during patient visits?
